reviews.comment:
Tipico lugar de encuentro motociclista,  es una parada clásica para ver hacia donde partimos para compartir momentos de esparcimiento,  charlas con amigos y unos buenos mates o almuerzo,  conocer  lugares nuevos o volver a otros que nos gustaron.

(Translated by Google)
A typical biker meeting place, it's a classic stop to see where we're headed, to share leisure time, chat with friends and some good mate or lunch, to discover new places or return to others we liked.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzLVAzcnRRRRAB
